calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim;
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion For Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that further orders to respond would not result in compliance. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
